# Aditya Rathod — Systems & Backend Engineer

## Who I Am

Aditya Rathod is a B.Tech Electrical Engineering student at IIT Jodhpur (CGPA 7.38/10, 2024–2028). He builds backend infrastructure platforms, static analysis engines, and computer vision systems with production-grade engineering.

## What I Build

### CORTEX — Local-First AI Infrastructure Platform
- FastAPI backend with 180+ endpoints across 10 routers
- 106 services, 44 models, 45 schemas, 37 database migrations
- PostgreSQL, Redis, embedded Qdrant vector DB, arq async workers
- JWT/CSRF authentication, Argon2 password hashing, Fernet/PBKDF2 encryption
- Agent execution loops: tool dispatch, stall detection, context compaction, token accounting
- Hybrid retrieval: episodic + semantic + working memory with vector search and knowledge-graph recall
- Next.js 15 + React 19 frontend
- 1,900+ automated tests
- GitHub: https://github.com/aditya8281/Cortex-Workspace

### ASTERA — Static Analysis & Code Intelligence Engine
- 12-crate Rust workspace
- Tree-sitter parsers for 14 languages
- Code Property Graph for symbol lookup, semantic search, dependency traversal, impact analysis
- Axum REST APIs, WebSocket events, plugin hooks
- SQLite FTS5 indexing, CLI commands, incremental file watching
- 153 automated tests, 92 Criterion benchmarks
- Performance: ~33ns language classification, ~3.27µs API stats, ~16µs FTS5 search
- GitHub: https://github.com/aditya8281/Astera.git

### Computer Vision & Embedded Systems
- Jetson Orin NX companion computer with Cube Orange flight controller over MAVLink
- YOLO object detection at 10–14 FPS onboard inference during flight tests
- ESP32-CAM face recognition with Edge Impulse (~90% accuracy)
- CNN-Attention research under Prof. Pratik Mazumder: imbalanced image classification, 30+ model variants

### Other Systems Projects
- PPO traffic signal control: 500k+ timesteps, 16 vectorized Gymnasium environments
- Parallel blockchain simulator: 7 concurrent threads, mutex-locked validation, SHA-256 PoW
- Peer-to-peer file transfer (plink): UPnP, NAT traversal, AES-256, 16 tasks completed

## Technical Skills

**Languages:** Python, Rust, C, C++, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Embedded C/C++
**Backend:** FastAPI, Axum, REST APIs, WebSockets, Pydantic, SQLAlchemy, JWT, CSRF
**Systems:** Concurrency, Multithreading, Tokio, Rayon, CLI Development, Async Programming
**Databases:** PostgreSQL, SQLite FTS5, Redis, Qdrant, Vector Search, Semantic Search, BM25, HNSW
**AI/ML:** PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, OpenCV, YOLO, CNNs, Transformers, Attention
**DevTools:** Tree-sitter, Static Analysis, Git, pytest, Criterion, Docker, GitHub Actions
**Robotics:** NVIDIA Jetson, Cube Orange, ArduPilot, MAVLink, ESP32-CAM, Arduino, TinyML
